title: English Literature
hod_vision: Our mission is to cultivate critical thinkers and creative writers.
overview: The Department of English Literature offers interdisciplinary study in literary history, criticism, and creative writing, preparing students for careers in education, research, and the creative industries.

title: Computer Science
hod_vision: To prepare innovators and problem-solvers for the technology sector.
overview: The Computer Science program focuses on programming, algorithms, software development, and computer systems, equipping students for industry and research roles.

title: Biology
hod_vision: Advancing biological knowledge and conservation through research and education.
overview: Biology explores living systems from molecules to ecosystems, combining laboratory work with field studies and research opportunities.

title: Chemistry
hod_vision: Innovating through chemical research and applied sciences.
overview: Chemistry provides strong fundamentals in analytical, organic, and physical chemistry with practical lab experience and research.

title: Physics
hod_vision: Exploring the physical universe through theory and experiment.
overview: Physics emphasizes theoretical foundations and experimental techniques across classical and modern physics.

title: Mathematics
hod_vision: Cultivating rigorous thinking and quantitative skills for diverse careers.
overview: Mathematics covers pure and applied topics, fostering analytical reasoning and problem-solving abilities.

title: History
hod_vision: Connecting past and present through rigorous historical scholarship.
overview: History examines societies, cultures, and events to build critical perspectives on the past and present.

title: Philosophy
hod_vision: Fostering clear reasoning and ethical insight.
overview: Philosophy develops skills in critical thinking, ethics, and logic applicable across disciplines.

title: Psychology
hod_vision: Advancing understanding of human behaviour and mental processes.
overview: Psychology combines theory and experimental practice to study cognition, behaviour, and mental health.

title: Sociology
hod_vision: Studying social structures and their impacts on communities.
overview: Sociology investigates social systems, inequality, and cultural practices through research and fieldwork.

title: Engineering
hod_vision: Solving real-world problems with engineering innovation.
overview: Engineering covers multiple disciplines including civil, mechanical, electrical and chemical engineering.

title: Civil Engineering
hod_vision: Designing resilient infrastructure for sustainable communities.
overview: Civil Engineering focuses on infrastructure, structural design, transportation, and environmental engineering.

title: Mechanical Engineering
hod_vision: Advancing mechanical systems and manufacturing technologies.
overview: Mechanical Engineering covers dynamics, thermodynamics, and design of mechanical systems.

title: Electrical Engineering
hod_vision: Powering innovation in electronics and systems.
overview: Electrical Engineering explores circuits, communications, and power systems.

title: Chemical Engineering
hod_vision: Translating chemical science into industrial solutions.
overview: Chemical Engineering integrates chemistry and engineering to design processes and materials.

title: Medicine
hod_vision: Training compassionate clinicians and medical researchers.
overview: Medicine prepares students for clinical practice and medical research with extensive practical training.

title: Law
hod_vision: Promoting justice through rigorous legal education.
overview: Law offers doctrinal training, practical clinics, and opportunities in legal research and advocacy.

title: Business Administration
hod_vision: Preparing future business leaders and entrepreneurs.
overview: Business Administration covers management, finance, marketing and entrepreneurship with practical projects.

title: Marketing
hod_vision: Driving innovation in consumer research and brand strategy.
overview: Marketing focuses on consumer behaviour, analytics, and strategic brand management.

title: Finance
hod_vision: Developing quantitative skills for financial leadership.
overview: Finance covers corporate finance, investments, and financial markets with quantitative training.

title: Environmental Science
hod_vision: Championing sustainable research and policy.
overview: Environmental Science blends fieldwork and lab research to address environmental challenges.

title: Medicine Faculty
hod_vision: Leading medical education and research.
overview: The Faculty of Medicine oversees clinical programs, research, and medical training.

title: Law Faculty
hod_vision: Promoting legal scholarship and public service.
overview: The Faculty of Law provides professional training and advanced legal research opportunities.
